Don't have a general nautila build since I use it in my comp with Aurita, Celeste, Caucus, and Nautila for retaliation damage. I kind of have her as silver key charge person. If she's the only main defence character and you want retaliation damage, can't go wrong with Caucus wheel, "Aching fin" and the 4 star wheel, "Shrouded in Darkness".

For the limited wheel, I like 24's wheel, "Aberration Rebound" since I can use it for anybody that needs more exalt charges or main DPS carry that requires spam. Most other cards are tied with the characters themselves
Of course, check the other wheels before making that decision

Anyone saw the new update?

We have received everyone’s feedback regarding the rewards for “Lunar Observation” and “Advanced Tasks”!

Therefore, we plan to make the following adjustments in the V1.6.4 update:

    •    After purchasing “Lunar Observation,” the daily login reward of Silver Chips will be increased from 100 to 200 during the effective period.
    •    For those who have already purchased “Lunar Observation,” we will provide additional compensation based on the number of daily Silver Chips already claimed before the update: each claim will be compensated with 100 Silver Chips. The compensation will be issued within 24 hours after the update.
    •    After unlocking “Advanced Tasks,” each level from 1 to 50 will receive an additional reward of 50 Silver Chips.
    •    For the advanced task rewards already claimed in the current task record, after the update, an additional 50 Silver Chips can be claimed for each level.
    •    For those who unlocked advanced tasks in previous phases, we will provide additional compensation based on the levels of advanced task rewards claimed in each phase: 50 Silver Chips for each level, up to 50 levels per phase. The compensation will be issued within 24 hours after the update.

Thank you for your continued companionship and support!
